title: Contractual Events in Court Decisions Dataset
author: Paulino-Passos, Guilherme
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: A dataset for the task of information extraction, in particular event extraction, in court decisions, focusing on contracts. Our dataset captures contractual relations and events that affect them in some way, such as negotiations preceding a (possible) contract, the execution of a contract, or its termination.
steps_raw: A dataset for the task of information extraction, in particular event extraction, in court decisions, focusing on contracts.
